problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuromorphic. Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity directly addresses this.
